_metadata.description: Final refined cluster profiles after model comparison (Phase 4). This file is the machine-readable export of all clustering results, structured for the dashboard UI team (Vaishnavi & Ankit).
_metadata.proposal_context: MacQueen (1967) K-Means clustering to 'cluster advertisers based on factors like spending, efficiency, and audience reach to identify different ad strategies.'

_field_descriptions.archetype: Human-readable label for the cluster's dominant campaign strategy pattern
_field_descriptions.size: Number of CA-targeting advertisers in this cluster

feature_means.total_spend: Average total USD spent by advertisers in this cluster (across all their ads, not just CA)
feature_means.ca_ad_count: Average number of CA-targeted ad creatives per advertiser
feature_means.avg_cpi: Average cost per impression in USD — lower means more efficient at reaching eyeballs (Coppock et al. 2020: 'tools to measure spending efficiency')
feature_means.avg_ad_duration: Average number of days each ad ran
feature_means.pct_video: Proportion of ads that are video format (0.0 to 1.0)
feature_means.pct_text: Proportion of ads that are text format (0.0 to 1.0)
feature_means.pct_image: Proportion of ads that are image format (0.0 to 1.0)
feature_means.pct_age_targeted: Proportion of ads with any age demographic targeting applied
feature_means.pct_gender_targeted: Proportion of ads with any gender demographic targeting applied
feature_means.avg_geo_targets: Average number of geographic entities targeted per ad (states, districts, etc.)
feature_means.spend_consistency: Coefficient of variation of weekly spend — higher means more bursty/irregular spending
feature_means.pct_spend_in_peak_week: Fraction of total spend concentrated in the single highest-spending week
feature_means.pct_spend_ca: Fraction of advertiser's total geographic spend allocated to California
feature_means.geo_hhi: Herfindahl-Hirschman Index across states (0-1) — higher means spend concentrated in fewer states
feature_means.avg_pct_target_young: Average proportion of age-targeted brackets that are young (18-34)
feature_means.avg_pct_target_middle: Average proportion of age-targeted brackets that are middle-aged (35-54)
feature_means.avg_pct_target_older: Average proportion of age-targeted brackets that are older (55+)
feature_means.pct_female_only: Proportion of ads targeting female audiences exclusively
feature_means.pct_male_only: Proportion of ads targeting male audiences exclusively
feature_means.has_district_targeting: Proportion of ads targeting specific CA congressional districts (vs. statewide)

quadrant_distribution.description: Distribution of advertisers across the Spend vs. Efficiency quadrant plot. Proposal: 'high spending with low efficiency, low spending with high efficiency'
quadrant_distribution.high_spend_high_efficiency: Advertisers above median spend AND below median CPI — large, efficient operations
quadrant_distribution.high_spend_low_efficiency: Advertisers above median spend AND above median CPI — large but costly per impression
quadrant_distribution.low_spend_high_efficiency: Advertisers below median spend AND below median CPI — small but efficient
quadrant_distribution.low_spend_low_efficiency: Advertisers below median spend AND above median CPI — small and costly

_field_descriptions.top_spenders: Top 5 advertisers by total spend within this cluster

top_spenders.Advertiser_Name: DONALD J. TRUMP FOR PRESIDENT, INC.
TRUMP MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN COMMITTEE
DNC SERVICES CORP / DEMOCRATIC NATIONAL COMMITTEE
